subcodes.first_line: A blazing fire and a radiant light, the Sun of Utterance hath risen from the horizon of the heaven of inner meanings, yet all remain veiled therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نار مشتعل و نور لائح آفتاب بیان از افق سماء معانی مشرق ولکن کل از او محجوب و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
